question: How do I select the AF Mode when before taking a picture?
content:
1. On the lens, set the focus mode switch to <AF>.<PIC>
2. Set the Mode Dial to a Creative Zone mode.
3. Press the <AF-WB> button.<PIC>
4. While watching the LCD panel, turn the Main Dial until the AF mode you want is displayed: ONE SHOT for One-Shot AF, AI FOCUS for AI Focus AF, or AI SERVO for AI Servo AF.<PIC>
In Basic Zone modes, the camera sets the AF mode automatically.
ret:
"1. On the lens, set the focus mode switch to <AF>.<PIC>
2. Set the Mode Dial to a Creative Zone mode.
3. Press the <AF-WB> button.<PIC>
4. While watching the LCD panel, turn the Main Dial until the AF mode you want is displayed: ONE SHOT for One-Shot AF, AI FOCUS for AI Focus AF, or AI SERVO for AI Servo AF.<PIC>
In Basic Zone modes, the camera sets the AF mode automatically.",["Manual10_99", "Camera_30", "Camera_31"]
notes: Canon EOS 20D AF mode selection procedure in Creative Zone modes; Basic Zone modes set AF mode automatically. Images correspond to the lens focus switch, AF-WB button, and LCD panel AF mode selection display.
